name: John's Incredible Pizza Company
description: John's Incredible Pizza Company is an American all-you-can-eat buffet restaurant, arcade, and family entertainment center business founded by John Parlet in 1997.  The company has 9 locations on the West Coast of the United States as of October 2025 (8 in California, 1 in Nevada).  Its corporate office is located in Rancho Santa Margarita, California.
